description_long: This object is a large, rectangular solar energy infrastructure installation featuring an array of solar panels arranged in a grid pattern. The panels are primarily dark gray with blue highlights, mounted on a metallic support structure that appears robust and industrial. Several raised black modules and box-like components are distributed across the surface, likely representing inverters, junction boxes, or other electrical equipment. The structure is elevated slightly above the ground, with a red edge marking one side, possibly indicating a boundary or safety feature. The surface is mostly flat with some sloped and stepped sections, and the overall design suggests it is intended for large-scale urban or industrial solar power generation. The materials and construction imply durability and the ability to support significant weight, making it suitable for rooftop or ground-mounted deployment in urban environments.
description: A large, grid-patterned solar panel array with blue and gray panels, mounted on a sturdy metallic structure with several raised black modules and a red boundary edge.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the solar panel array, with blue and gray panels, black modules, and a prominent red edge at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the installation, the stepped surface, and the distribution of black modules and blue panel sections.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back edge, more black modules, and the overall flatness of the array with some raised components.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the sloped sections, the arrangement of blue panels, and the metallic support structure beneath.
attribute_panel_orientation: flat to slightly tilted at approximately 10 degrees, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with metallic (likely aluminum or steel) frame and support posts
attribute_array_configuration: multiple rows in a rectangular grid, approximately 5x8 panel configuration
